decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is already route_125th-laguardia-sbs, which perfectly matches: same route_id (M60), same Select Bus Service variant, same boroughs (Manhattan, Queens), and the source 2013_06_06_sbs_125th_cb1 is already registered on that canonical record. The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so per rules this is 'new' — no link to a different record is needed.
